tagline: Care is ours, Cure is divine

hero.subtitle: Led by Dr. Febina Sulthana, Hitech Medicity blends advanced clinical precision with the restorative heritage of Kerala's coast.

pillars.title: Rigorous Diagnosis
pillars.description: Evidence-based modern medicine with advanced diagnostics, ensuring every treatment plan is precise and personalized.

pillars.title: Restorative Traditions
pillars.description: Ayurveda, Naturopathy, and Yoga woven into clinical pathways — honouring Kerala's 3,000-year healing legacy.

pillars.title: Holistic Recovery
pillars.description: From physiotherapy to post-trauma care, recovery is designed as a complete experience — not an afterthought.

pillars.title: A Place to Heal
pillars.description: 3-star stay facilities where patients recover in comfort, steps from Calicut's coast and cultural heart.

services.label: Our Services
services.heading: Every discipline,
services.subtitle: From modern medicine and Ayurveda to physiotherapy and dental care — a comprehensive range of treatments, designed around you.

items.name: Allopathy
items.description: Evidence-based modern medicine with advanced diagnostics and treatment protocols.

items.name: Ayurveda
items.description: Traditional Ayurvedic therapies, Panchakarma, and dedicated wellness suites for holistic recovery.

items.name: Naturopathy
items.description: Nature-based healing using herbal remedies, restorative routines, and lifestyle therapies.

items.name: Yoga and Meditation
items.description: Guided therapeutic yoga and mindfulness practices for flexibility, strength, breathing, and mental wellness.

items.name: Physiotherapy & Orthoneuro Rehabilitation
items.description: Advanced rehabilitation services for orthopedic and neurological conditions with specialized equipment.

items.name: Dental
items.description: Comprehensive dental care with modern chair-side equipment and advanced treatment protocols.

items.name: Cosmetology
items.description: Aesthetic and cosmetic care services for beauty, grooming, and skin wellness.

specializations.label: Specializations
specializations.heading: What we
specializations.subtitle: Dedicated clinics and rehabilitation programmes for specific conditions — each backed by expert teams and proven protocols.

items.name: Stroke Rehabilitation
items.description: Comprehensive post-stroke recovery programs for regaining mobility, speech, and independence.

items.name: Back/Knee/Joint Pain
items.description: Specialized treatment for chronic and acute musculoskeletal pain management.

items.name: Spine, Disc & Spinal Cord Issues
items.description: Comprehensive spinal care including disc problems, scoliosis, stenosis, and spinal cord injury rehabilitation.

items.name: Parkinson's & Movement Disorders
items.description: Dedicated clinic for Parkinson's disease, tremors, dystonia, and other neurological movement abnormalities.

items.name: Post Accidental Rehabilitation
items.description: Complete recovery programs for road traffic accident victims and trauma patients.

items.name: Lifestyle Disorders
items.description: Holistic management of lifestyle-related conditions including obesity, hypertension, and metabolic syndrome.

items.name: Cerebral Palsy
items.description: Specialized pediatric care and therapeutic interventions for cerebral palsy management.

items.name: Autism
items.description: Evidence-based autism spectrum disorder interventions and developmental support programs.

items.name: Diabetic Clinic
items.description: Comprehensive diabetes management including dietary counseling, medication, and complication prevention.

items.name: Glaucoma Clinic
items.description: Specialized glaucoma screening, monitoring, and treatment to preserve vision.

items.name: Infertility Clinic
items.description: Holistic infertility management combining modern medicine with traditional therapies.

facilities.label: Our Facilities
facilities.heading: Every facility,
facilities.subtitle: Purpose-built spaces equipped for advanced rehabilitation, therapy, and patient care.

items.name: Physiotherapy & Gait Lab
items.description: Comprehensive rehab with parallel bars, balance training, hand therapy, and advanced gait analysis.

items.name: Rooftop Rehab & Play Therapy
items.description: Open-air therapeutic play centre with sensory tracks, trampolines, and terrace fitness equipment.

items.name: Aesthetic & Hair Clinic
items.description: Dedicated beauty, grooming, and cosmetic care space.

items.name: In-house Pharmacy
items.description: Integrated medicine and wellness products under one roof.

items.name: Spa & Massage Room
items.description: Relaxing spa and massage therapy rooms for rejuvenation and holistic wellness.

stay.label: The Stay
stay.heading: Recovery,
stay.subtitle: Every room is designed around patient comfort — premium interiors, accessible amenities, and a home-like environment for long and short stays.

categories.label: Premium Suites
categories.description: Spacious double-occupancy rooms with designer interiors, ambient lighting, and attached amenities for extended recovery stays.

categories.label: Single Rooms
categories.description: Comfortable single-occupancy rooms with vanity, storage, and a private, restful atmosphere.

categories.label: Bathrooms & Accessibility
categories.description: Thoughtfully designed washrooms with grab bars, spacious layouts, and safety-first fixtures for all patients.

categories.label: In-room Amenities
categories.description: Kitchenette access, utility spaces, and practical storage — everything for a comfortable extended stay.

categories.label: Reception & Lounge
categories.description: Warm waiting spaces designed for comfort and privacy.

categories.label: Healthy Café
categories.description: On-site café for fresh, recovery-friendly nourishment.

stay.virtualTourDesc: Explore every corner of our facility — drag to look around

testimonials.label: Stories
testimonials.heading: Voices of
testimonials.muneerQuote: Hitech Medicity, Calicut is a blessing to the city itself. It offers an integrated treatment methodology with state-of-the-art modern facilities. While primarily Ayurveda, they integrate acupuncture, physiotherapy along with a combination of allopathy. I've made multiple visits where I've had long stays and taken treatments of due course. As far as I am concerned — it is a rejuvenation. Moreover, I've found cure to my diseases from here. I am a chronic diabetic patient. Besides the fact that my diabetes came down, such was the case for my creatinine count as well. As I mentioned, when I was leaving here, it was a literal feeling of rejuvenation — the energy of which I still carry with me to this day. I would even go so far as to say that it is not just about treatment here, but a real lifestyle change is what you can expect. Naturopathy is also a part of the treatments available here. As I mentioned already, this place is indeed a blessing.
testimonials.ahmedQuote: The treatment I received at Hitech Medicity was world-class. Dr. Febina and her team provided exceptional care that I couldn't find elsewhere. The combination of modern and traditional treatments made all the difference.
testimonials.naufalQuote: I came for physiotherapy and was amazed by the holistic approach. The facility feels like a premium retreat, not a hospital. The staff treats you like family.
testimonials.deepakQuote: Hitech Medicity changed my perspective on healthcare. The integration of Ayurveda with modern medicine under one roof is remarkable. Truly a unique facility in Calicut.

media.label: International Recognition
media.heading: Putting India on the Map
media.monaTitle: Egyptian TV Presenter · Investigative Journalist · Documentary Producer
media.monaDesc: With millions of followers across the Arab world, Mona Iraqi is one of Egypt's most prominent investigative journalists and TV presenters. Her stay at our facility was a moment of pride for us and for Indian Ayurveda.

calicut.label: Heart of Calicut
calicut.heading: Heal where history
calicut.p1: Calicut — the city of spices, trade, and timeless hospitality. A prosperous port city with roots stretching back millennia, where Zamorin kings once welcomed the world.
calicut.p2: Today, it's a vibrant blend of traditional Kerala architecture and modern energy. World-class cuisines — from Malabar biryani to fresh-caught seafood — sit alongside heritage temples, mosques, and colonial architecture.
calicut.p3: Steps from the beach, surrounded by local delights and cultural richness, Hitech Medicity is perfectly positioned for healing that extends beyond the clinical.
calicut.visitDesc: Located in the heart of Calicut, just minutes from the beach and easily accessible from the airport and railway station.

cta.label: Begin Your Journey
cta.heading: Your health deserves
cta.subtitle: Connect with Dr. Febina Sulthana's team to discuss your treatment plan and explore our facility.

footer.description: Science-led healing in the heart of Calicut, Kerala. Led by Dr. Febina Sulthana.

about.label: The Doctor
about.name: Dr. Febina
about.bio1: A physician who believes that healing is not simply the absence of disease, but the presence of vitality. Dr. Febina Sulthana founded Hitech Medicity with a singular vision: to create a space where clinical rigour and human compassion are inseparable.
about.bio2: Trained in modern medicine and deeply rooted in Kerala's healing traditions, she has built a practice that bridges the precision of evidence-based diagnostics with the wisdom of Ayurveda, physiotherapy, and holistic wellness.
about.bio3: Her approach is personal. Every patient receives a treatment plan that considers not just their condition, but their life — their routines, their stress, their goals. This is medicine that sees the whole person.
about.visionText: Hitech Medicity is more than a hospital — it's a destination for healing. With 3-star stay facilities, a team of specialists across 14+ disciplines, and a location in the cultural heart of Calicut, Dr. Febina has created a space where patients don't just recover — they are restored.
about.teamText: Behind every treatment is a team of dedicated specialists — physiotherapists, Ayurvedic practitioners, dentists, neurologists, and support staff — all working under Dr. Febina's integrated care philosophy. Together, they bring expertise across 14+ disciplines to deliver compassionate, coordinated care.
